rationale.R1.2: The artifact makes a load-bearing claim of full decentralization and zero cross-shard coordination, then immediately describes synchronous Paxos replication of the threshold histogram across all shards every 30 seconds — a direct internal contradiction. Logical-consistency review is the most plausible load-bearing task for an unqualified 'take a look' on a technical systems abstract, but the delegation does not rule out writing-polish or contribution-framing goals.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I focus on the technical and logical soundness of the claims (e.g., whether the synchronous Paxos recalibration contradicts the paper's 'fully decentralized / no cross-shard coordination' assertions), or on the quality of the writing and prose clarity?
